description:
DOUBLE LAYER DESIGN: The electronics bag is designed with 2 Layers of interior compartment, the upper compartment can be used to organize small items, like cables, USB, and chargers, and the lower partition to store larger items, like adapters, and external hard drives, Tablet Computer and other travel accessories. Besides, the padded dividers are adjustable and can be adjusted for your needs.

HIGH QUALITY & WATERPROOF: This electronics organizer is made of water-resistant and durable cation material, and can protect your electronic accessories against spills, rain, dust, and scratches. Other eminent features include a strong carrying handle and smooth zipper closure for ease of use, safety, and security. This travel cord organizer is very strong and durable. All the things inside are protected very well.

PORTABLE & CONVENIENT: Portable size 10.63 X 7.87 X 3.54 inches, an ideal size to carry and fit in your backpack and luggage. The portable handle design makes it easy to carry and use, electronics travel organizer is a must-have travel gear for daily use, business setups, school, office, and business trips. Just put all your important devices in the travel cable organizer, preventing you from leaving things behind.

MULTIFUNCTIONAL USE: This electronic travel organizer contains a variety of pockets, enough to hold different types of electronic accessories. The cable organizer bag is not only for protecting your electronic accessories, but also suitable for storing pens, pills, makeup, etc. The charger case is a great gift for Christmas, New Year and Valentine's Day.


Large capacity for all your electronic accessories
If you are tired of looking for messy data cables, chargers, hard drive, batteries and power banks everywhere, then you must need our electronic cable bag to help you organize your electronic accessories. This electronic organizer is designed with double layers, roomy enough to hold various items, like power bank, flash drive, memory card, SD cards, USB drive, cellphone, charger, mouse, kindle, tablet and other accessories.

Double Layer:

- The First Layer:

6 elastic loops for various cords, USB cables, charging cables, earphones, pens.

5 mesh pouches for storing multiple sizes of USB drives, batteries, flash drive, etc.

2 zipper mesh pocket can store a cell phone, power bank, portable hard drive, power adapter, CF cards, U disk, etc.

- The Second Layer:

1 zipper mesh pocket can fit up to iPad Tablet, iPad air, kindle.

Adjustable padded dividers with velcro to hold laptop charger, wall charger and other computer accessories.
